calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Petitioner Carol Dawson was sworn and examined. The Court grants decree changing Petitioner's name to Carol Sue Dawson Rose. Decree signed in open court.
